beforeApproval:
1. Open claude.ai and sign in to your account.
2. Click your profile icon in the bottom-left corner of the screen.
3. Select Settings, then click on Account.
4. Your Organization ID is displayed in UUID format — copy it exactly as shown.

For ChatGPT packages:
1. Open chatgpt.com and sign in to your account.
2. Press F12 to open DevTools, then click the Application tab.
3. In the left panel, expand Storage → Cookies → https://chatgpt.com.
4. Find the cookie named **__Secure-next-auth.session-token** and copy its full value.
5. Paste the entire JSON value into the Session Details field below.
afterApproval:
1. Open claude.ai (or chatgpt.com) and sign in to your account.
2. Click your profile icon in the bottom-left corner.
3. Navigate to **Settings → Billing** (Claude) or **Settings → My Plan** (ChatGPT).
4. Your plan should now display as **Claude Pro** or **ChatGPT Plus** with an active status.
5. You can confirm by starting a new conversation — upgraded users have access to advanced models and extended usage limits.
6. If you do not see the upgrade after 10 minutes, please contact us on WeChat.
